title: Nitrogen Narcosis Explained
script_summary: An accurate explanation of nitrogen narcosis and its effects.

segments.voiceover: What if deep-sea diving could make you feel drunk?
This phenomenon is called nitrogen narcosis — a potential risk for divers.
As divers descend, pressure increases. More nitrogen enters the bloodstream. Things get... hazy.
Symptoms range from euphoria to impaired judgment. Some even report hallucinations.
But here's the twist: not everyone reacts the same way. It remains unpredictable.
Stay informed about diving safety! Like and follow for more science insights.
